AnimalWithRelations.description: Animal with carer, records, and photos

records.description: All care records for this animal

status.description: AssetStatus: AVAILABLE, IN_USE, MAINTENANCE, RETIRED, LOST.

targetUserId.description: Clerk user ID of the member to assign a role.

CallLogLookupsResponse.description: All or a subset of lookup lists, depending on the ?type filter.

CreateAnimalBody.description: Request body for creating an animal. The server persists the ANIMAL_SAFE_FIELDS allow-list; clerkUserId and clerkOrganizationId are taken from the authenticated session.

_autoGenerateOrgAnimalId.description: Set true to atomically assign the next orgAnimalId

clerkOrganizationId.description: Defaults to the active Clerk org

dateFound.description: ISO-8601 date the animal was found

orgAnimalId.description: Organisation-scoped animal ID (ignored when _autoGenerateOrgAnimalId is true)

photo.description: Photo URL/key, e.g. the url returned by POST /api/upload/image

callLogId.description: Link session to an existing call log.

callerPhone.description: Phone number to send the pindrop SMS link to.

speciesNames.description: Species names belonging to this group.

key.description: S3 key for the uploaded document.

amountCents.description: Donation amount in cents (e.g. 1000 = $10.00 AUD). Integer only - no decimals.

handle.description: Organisation subdomain handle (identifies which org receives the donation)

isAnonymous.description: If true, donor name is hidden from org dashboard

sourceId.description: Square payment source nonce from the Web Payments SDK card form
Square payment source (card nonce or token).

DonationResult.description: Result of a successful donation payment

EnrichedCarer.description: Org member enriched with CarerProfile and training data.

hasProfile.description: True when a CarerProfile row exists for this member.

name.description: Display name from Clerk, falling back to identifier or "Unknown".

measurements.description: Map of measurement field names to mm/gram values.

hoursOverdue.description: Hours past due (negative when not yet due).

nextDueAt.description: When the next feed is due.

url.description: S3 key for the uploaded image.

ImpactStatsResponse.description: Membership impact statistics for the organisation.

customFieldsJson.description: Custom form fields as a JSON object.

amountCents.description: Price in the smallest currency unit (e.g. AUD cents).

benefitsJson.description: Ordered list of member-facing benefit lines.

role.description: The current user's OrgRole; the API returns CARER when no explicit role is set.

OnboardingStatus.description: Booleans driving the membership platform setup checklist.

url.description: Relative or absolute URL to the uploaded photo

PortalSquareConfig.description: Square embed credentials for the member portal checkout.

sendEmail.description: Also send an email to all active members.

query.description: Safe QL text validated by the custom-query parser.

updatedAnimal.description: Partial Animal record with updated status.

UpdateAnimalBody.description: Partial update body for an animal

clerkBearer.description: Clerk session token sent as "Authorization: Bearer <token>". Equivalent to the __session cookie; used by native/mobile clients. Absent or invalid -> 401.

clerkSession.description: Clerk session cookie. Multi-tenant: subdomain -> org_url session claim. Absent or invalid -> 401. Org mismatch or missing permission -> 403.
clerkSession.name: __session

cronSecret.description: Bearer CRON_SECRET environment variable. Required on all /api/internal/* routes.

keepaliveApiKey.description: API key for the keepalive endpoint. Matches KEEPALIVE_API_KEY env var (timing-safe compare).
keepaliveApiKey.name: x-api-key

pinAccess.description: PIN-access token for public animal record lookup routes (no Clerk session required).
pinAccess.name: pin

squareOAuthState.description: Square OAuth signed state parameter; verified against a server-side nonce on callback.
squareOAuthState.name: state

squareWebhookSignature.description: Square HMAC-SHA256 webhook signature verified in-handler against the raw body.
squareWebhookSignature.name: x-square-hmacsha256-signature

info.description: REST API for WildTrack360 - wildlife conservation management covering animal lifecycle, carer compliance, membership, payments, and regulatory reporting.

get.description: Returns all animals the calling user can access. Access is scoped by role: ADMIN/COORDINATOR_ALL/CARER_ALL see all org animals; COORDINATOR sees their assigned species groups; CARER sees only their own animals.

patch.description: Partial update. CARER can only edit their assigned animal; COORDINATOR is restricted to their species groups; ADMIN/COORDINATOR_ALL/CARER_ALL have full access. Status transitions are validated by compliance guardrails (override requires `compliance:override_validation`).
